testcase.name: parseTokensFromContent > extracts color tokens from YAML frontmatter
parseTokensFromContent > extracts typography tokens including all three font families
parseTokensFromContent > extracts rounded tokens
parseTokensFromContent > extracts spacing tokens
parseTokensFromContent > YAML wins over text section — text section hex values are not in tokens
parseTokensFromContent > primary color comes from YAML, not from text-section editorial hint
parseTokensFromContent > throws on missing opening ---
parseTokensFromContent > throws on missing closing ---
parseTokensFromContent > throws on corrupt YAML with line number in message
parseTokensFromContent > returns empty objects for missing optional sections
BaseSpecialist abstract contract > concrete subclass implements execute and can be instantiated
LLMGateway.selectTier > returns reasoning for reasoning hint
LLMGateway.selectTier > returns lightweight for lightweight hint
trace_id propagation > extractTraceId returns the X-Trace-Id header value
trace_id propagation > extractTraceId returns empty string when header absent
trace_id propagation > generateHttpTraceId returns a 16-char hex string
trace_id propagation > generateHttpTraceId is unique per call
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-4: throws FORBIDDEN when activeAccountId is null
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-4: calls next=false (does not proceed) when activeAccountId missing
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-5: skips RLS and calls next when meta.isGlobal=true
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-5: isGlobal skips even when activeAccountId is present
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: sets app.current_account_id via set_config for valid context
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: sets app.current_user_id when user.id is present
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: skips app.current_user_id when user is null
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: calls next with updated ctx including transaction prisma
accountIsolationMiddleware > AC-2: wraps resolver in $transaction (ensures set_config is LOCAL)
ipAccounts.active > returns null when no account found
ipAccounts.active > returns account data when found
ipAccounts.active > queries with activeAccountId from ctx
ipAccounts.switchActive > updates user.activeAccountId and writes audit_log
ipAccounts.switchActive > throws NOT_FOUND when account does not belong to user
ipAccounts.switchActive > throws UNAUTHORIZED when no user in ctx
ipAccounts.switchActive > zod: rejects non-positive accountId
ipAccounts.switchActive > zod: rejects non-integer accountId
stepData.save > upserts step data and returns { ok: true, data }
stepData.save > passes traceId from ctx to upsert
stepData.save > zod: rejects empty stepKey
stepData.save > zod: accepts empty inputs object
auth.me > returns unauthenticated stub when no user in ctx
auth.me > returns user info when authenticated
auth.me > exposes only id, email, name (not password or session data)
invite.redeem — success > AC-3: calls findUnique then update with usedById=user.id and returns updated invite
invite.redeem — duplicate > AC-4: already-used invite code → throws CONFLICT 409
invite.redeem — not found > unknown code → throws NOT_FOUND
invite.redeem — unauthenticated > no user session → throws UNAUTHORIZED
IPProgressService.progress > returns 0/9 with empty completedSteps when no stepData rows exist
IPProgressService.progress > correctly counts completed steps from DB rows
IPProgressService.progress > sets nextStep to first incomplete step
IPProgressService.progress > returns nextStep=null when all 9 steps completed
IPProgressService.progress > ignores unknown stepKeys (not in STEPS constant)
IPProgressService.progress > queries DB with correct accountId
ipAccounts.list > AC-5: calls findMany without explicit where:{userId} (RLS handles it)
ipAccounts.active > returns the active account by activeAccountId
ipAccounts.active > returns null when account not found
ipAccounts.create > creates account with user.id from context
ipAccounts.update > updates the active account (where:{id: activeAccountId})
ipAccounts.delete > soft-deletes by setting isActive=false + archivedAt
ipAccounts.switchActive > AC-6: updates user.activeAccountId and writes audit_log
ipAccounts.switchActive > AC-6: throws UNAUTHORIZED when user is null
ipAccounts.switchActive > AC-6: throws NOT_FOUND when account does not belong to user
stepData.get > AC-8: queries by stepKey only (no accountId — RLS handles it)
stepData.get > returns null when stepKey not found
stepData.getAll > calls findMany without where:{accountId} (RLS handles it)
stepData.save > AC-7: upserts with accountId_stepKey composite key
stepData.progress > returns completed/total counts for the current account
stepData.progress > returns zero completed when no step data exists
knowledge.getRecommendations > returns mock recommendation array without DB calls
knowledge.getScriptCases > returns mock script case array and echoes industry filter
knowledge.getFavorites > calls knowledgeFavorite.findMany and returns favorites array
knowledge.addFavorite > AC-6: creates favorite with activeAccountId (per-account isolation)
knowledge.removeFavorite > calls knowledgeFavorite.deleteMany with accountId+itemType+itemKey and returns {ok:true}
knowledge.getNotes > calls knowledgeNote.findMany and returns notes array
knowledge.addNote > creates note with activeAccountId and content
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-3: happy path — primary succeeds, no fallback field
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-3: primary fails both attempts → falls back to gpt-4o
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-3: retry once — fails first, succeeds second (same primary)
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-4: both providers fail → returns fallback template string
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-4: both fail → cost_log written with success=false
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-5: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY missing → throws specific error
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-6: cost_log written on success with correct fields
LLMGateway · fallback > AC-6: cost_log res.fallback present when fallback used
LLMGateway · fallback > lightweight tier: primary is haiku, fallback is gpt-4o-mini
LLMGateway · rate limiting > AC-11: throws RateLimitError when quota exceeded, no LLM call
LLMGateway · rate limiting > AC-11: RateLimitError has correct userId and code
LLMGateway · rate limiting > AC-11: checkRateLimit is called with userId from metadata
LLMGateway · rate limiting > checkRateLimit called once per complete() call
LLMGateway · rate limiting > RateLimitError constructor sets message and code
LLMGateway · rate limiting > complete() succeeds when rate limit passes
copywriting.generate > AC-7: creates History row with traceId and returns mock content
copywriting.optimize > AC-7: creates History row for optimization with traceId
copywriting.list > returns array of history entries without hitting history.create
copywriting.delete > calls history.delete with the given historyId and returns {ok: true}
videoAnalysis.analyze > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=video_analysis and traceId
videoAnalysis.rewrite > AC-7: creates History row for rewrite with traceId
videoProduction.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=video_production
videoProduction.generateStoryboard > AC-7: creates History row for storyboard with traceId
videoProduction.generateSceneImage > AC-7: creates History row for scene image with traceId
boomGenerate.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=boom_generate and traceId
monetization.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=monetization and traceId
privateDomain.generate > AC-7: creates History row with agentId=private_domain and traceId
diagnosis.generate > AC-7: creates DiagnosisReport row with agentId=DiagnosisAgent and traceId
diagnosis.generate > zod: rejects answers array with wrong length
diagnosis.history > calls diagnosisReport.findMany with default limit=10
diagnosis.latest > calls diagnosisReport.findFirst ordered by createdAt desc
diagnosis.latest > returns null when no reports found
evolution.evolve > AC-7: creates FeedbackLog row with rating and agentId
evolution.getConfig > returns profile config when profile exists
evolution.getConfig > returns default config when profile does not exist
evolution.updateConfig > upserts EvolutionProfile and returns ok + updated config
evolution.history > calls evolutionInsight.findMany with default limit=20
evolution.recentFeedback > calls feedbackLog.findMany and returns array
evolution.recentFeedback > passes agentId filter to where clause when provided
evolution.feedbackTrend > returns mock trend data with requested days
evolution.moduleRanking > returns mock ranking array
deepLearning.list > calls deepLearningArchive.findMany with isActive filter by default
deepLearning.create > creates DeepLearningArchive with sourceType=text
deepLearning.createFromFile > creates archive with sourceType=file and placeholder sample
deepLearning.learn > updates archive learningStatus to pending and returns {ok:true, status:"queued"}
deepLearning.delete > soft-deletes archive by setting isActive=false
trending.fetch > AC-5: returns mock TrendingItem array without RLS transaction
trending.listByIndustry > returns mock items with the requested industry
trending.listByStyle > returns mock items with the requested presentStyle
MockProvider > validateCallback always returns mock dev user
MockProvider > getAuthorizationUrl returns URL with /auth/callback?mock=true
validateStartupConfig > calls process.exit(1) when SESSION_SECRET < 32 chars
validateStartupConfig > calls process.exit(1) when OAUTH_PROVIDER is unknown
validateStartupConfig > calls process.exit(1) when NODE_ENV=production and OAUTH_PROVIDER=mock
requiresCsrfCheck > returns false for mock provider (name=mock) — dev only
requiresCsrfCheck > returns true for google provider — always enforced
requiresCsrfCheck > returns true for any unknown real provider
requiresCsrfCheck > attack scenario: ?mock=true query param cannot bypass CSRF for google provider
ContextAssembler > all routes succeed → AssembledContext 结构完整
ContextAssembler > stepData 非空 → layersUsed 包含 L2_step_data
ContextAssembler > stepData 为空 → 注入占位 [新用户 · 暂无 step 数据]
ContextAssembler > L4 EvolutionProfile 降级 → 注入 [L1 阶段 · 暂无进化档案]
ContextAssembler > L5 RAG 降级 → ragHits 为空数组
ContextAssembler > L2 stepData fetch timeout → 占位注入 · constants 层不受影响
ContextAssembler > L2 fetch reject → 降级占位 · assemble 不抛出
ContextAssembler > 7 PRD-4 Specialist agentId 全有模板覆盖
ContextAssembler > 每个模板 persona 和 methodology 字段非空
ContextAssembler > MethodologyQueryWorker 拉常量 → systemPrompt 含脚本类型和爆款元素
ContextAssembler > contextTokens 等于 chars/4 粗算
ContextAssembler > metadata.layersUsed 仅含成功层(L2 失败时不含 L2)
ContextAssembler > R-001: systemPrompt 不含 BASE_LLM_URL / LLM_API_KEY / sk-
ContextAssembler > assemble 耗时 ≤ 800ms(并行 4 路 · 模拟正常 DB 响应)
ContextAssembler > prisma.stepData.findMany 调用时传入正确 accountId(反模式 REJ-008)
ContextAssembler > 无模板的 agentId(DiagnosisAgent) → fallback persona · 不抛出
BaseSpecialist — input schema validation > AC-8: valid input passes inputSchema.parse and proceeds
BaseSpecialist — input schema validation > AC-8: invalid input (empty topic) throws ZodError before LLM call
BaseSpecialist — output schema validation > AC-8: SchemaValidationError thrown when output fails outputSchema.safeParse
BaseSpecialist — output schema validation > AC-8: valid output passes safeParse and returns SpecialistResponse
BaseSpecialist — template method 4 steps > AC-8: execute() calls contextAssembler.assemble before invokeLLM
BaseSpecialist — template method 4 steps > AC-8: execute() result contains tokensUsed matching gateway response
BaseSpecialist — 五层配置完整性 > AC-8: config has all 5 required layers (persona/memory/knowledge/tools/execution)
BaseSpecialist — 五层配置完整性 > AC-8: config.execution.model_tier drives model selection (no hardcoded model names)
BaseSpecialist — mock LLMGateway injection > AC-8: injected gateway.complete is called with model_tier from config
BaseSpecialist — mock LLMGateway injection > AC-8: isFallback=true propagated when gateway returns isFallback
BaseSpecialist — cost_log 写入字段完整(AC-7) > AC-8: writeCostLog called with all 7 required fields
BaseSpecialist — 性能(AC-9) > AC-9: class instantiation < 5ms
BaseSpecialist — 性能(AC-9) > AC-9: 100 mock execute() runs without LLM < 1s
Error classes > SchemaValidationError has correct name and issues
Error classes > LLMTimeoutError has correct name, agentId, timeoutMs
Error classes > FallbackTriggeredError has correct name and reason
useStepData LS logic > save writes inputs under account-namespaced key (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > load reads the LS value back for the same account (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > load returns null when key is absent (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > LS is NOT rolled back after simulated DB failure (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > accountId=null: save writes nothing to LS (AC-1 guard)
useStepData LS logic > different step keys produce distinct LS entries (AC-1)
useStepData LS logic > save prunes non-active namespaces when LS is near 5 MB (AC-8)
useActiveAccount LS logic > switchTo clears all LS keys of the old account namespace (AC-2, AC-6)
useActiveAccount LS logic > switchTo preserves new account namespace (AC-2)
useActiveAccount LS logic > grep simulation: 0 hits for old namespace after switch (AC-6)
useActiveAccount LS logic > multiple tabs: each tab has its own storage — LS does not bleed (AC-7)
useEvolution LS logic > caches evolution profile to LS with account-namespaced key (AC-3)
useEvolution LS logic > returns null when no LS cache for evolution (AC-3 initial state)
useEvolution LS logic > LS cache key is account-specific — no bleed between accounts (AC-7)
useEvolution LS logic > LS cache for switched-from account is cleared; new account cache intact (AC-3)
useEvolution LS logic > handles malformed LS JSON gracefully (parse safety)
ls-namespace key builders > key-01: stepLsKey account=1 step=step1
ls-namespace key builders > key-02: stepLsKey account=1 step=step2
ls-namespace key builders > key-03: stepLsKey account=1 step=step3
ls-namespace key builders > key-04: stepLsKey account=1 step=step4
ls-namespace key builders > key-05: stepLsKey account=1 step=step5
ls-namespace key builders > key-06: stepLsKey account=1 step=step6
ls-namespace key builders > key-07: stepLsKey account=1 step=step7
ls-namespace key builders > key-08: stepLsKey account=1 step=step8
ls-namespace key builders > key-09: stepLsKey account=1 step=step9
ls-namespace key builders > key-10: evolutionLsKey account=1
ls-namespace key builders > key-11: stepLsKey account=42 must use account 42 namespace
ls-namespace key builders > key-12: evolutionLsKey account=42
ls-namespace key builders > key-13: accountLsPrefix has trailing underscore
ls-namespace key builders > key-14: LS_PREFIX is correct
ls-namespace key builders > key-15: stepLsKey account=0 is well-formed
clearLsNamespace > key-16: removes all keys for the target account namespace
clearLsNamespace > key-17: preserves keys from other account namespaces (AC-6 isolation)
lsUsedBytes and pruneLsNamespaces > key-18: pruneLsNamespaces removes non-active keys when limit exceeded
router route count (AC-001) > has exactly 9 step routes
router route count (AC-001) > has exactly 14 tool routes
router route count (AC-001) > has exactly 6 new module routes
router route count (AC-001) > has 3 auxiliary routes + catch-all = 4 extra
router route count (AC-001) > total router children = 34 (33 path routes + 1 root index redirect)
router route count (AC-001) > covers all 9 step keys from ARCHITECTURE §3.6.4
router route count (AC-001) > includes /ip-plan route (AC-001 §9.4 exit condition)
router route count (AC-001) > includes /accounts route (AC-001 account switcher)
router route count (AC-001) > catch-all wildcard present for /404 fallback (AC-001)
router route count (AC-001) > no duplicate routes
router route count (AC-001) > all tool hrefs from Header.tsx TOOLS_14 are covered
router route count (AC-001) > all new module hrefs from Header.tsx NEW_MODULES_6 are covered
stepConfig > has exactly 9 entries
stepConfig > contains all expected step keys
stepConfig > every entry has non-empty title
stepConfig > every entry has non-empty description
stepConfig > every entry has non-empty phase
stepConfig > step1 has correct title
stepConfig > step9 has correct title
stepConfig > step5 phase is 运营
stepConfig > returns undefined for unknown key
auth.me HTTP endpoint > GET /trpc/auth.me returns unauthenticated shape
[Integration] mock login flow > AC-2/3/5: mock login creates session cookie + DB row
[Integration] mock login flow > AC-4: auth.me with valid session returns authenticated user
[E2E] CSRF + session lifecycle > AC-8: mock provider bypasses CSRF — mismatched state still completes login
[E2E] CSRF + session lifecycle > AC-11: expired session → auth.me returns unauthenticated
[Perf] login flow timing > AC-13: full mock login flow (callback → session) < 500ms
[Perf] login flow timing > AC-13: auth.me with valid session < 100ms
LLMGateway · integration (nock) > complete() calls Anthropic API and returns parsed response
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-3: user A (correct account) sees their own step_data rows
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-3: user B (different account) sees 0 rows from step_data
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-4: no set_config → 0 rows (RLS default-deny via NULL::int)
[Integration] RLS account isolation via set_config > AC-7: set_config round-trip overhead < 50ms on localhost
[Integration] trace_id propagation > echoes provided X-Trace-Id in response header
[Integration] trace_id propagation > generates 16-char hex trace ID when header is absent
